cases.description: Sample standard deviation of two hand-verifiable values, identical formula/data to STDEV_basic_two_points in the STDEV file

STDEV.S on the classic Wikipedia sample dataset {2,4,4,4,5,5,7,9} - must match STDEV_matches_STDEV_S_same_data exactly, since STDEV.S is simply the Excel-2010+ modern name for the legacy STDEV calculation (same n-1 sample formula)

Sample stdev needs n>=2 (divides by n-1); one value -> #DIV/0!, confirmed against Microsoft's STDEV.S documentation of the n-1 method (https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/stdev-s-function-7d69cf97-0c1f-4acf-be27-f3e83904cc23)
